originContent: ## Orca Engine
translatedContent: ## Orca Engine

originContent: Discord: https://discord.gg/bvdpdT26Tq
translatedContent: Discord: https://discord.gg/bvdpdT26Tq

originContent: Based on Godot Engine, with enhancements by Simplifine.
translatedContent: Based on Godot Engine, with enhancements by Simplifine.

originContent: ### What's the catch?
translatedContent: ### What's the catch?

originContent: We are integrating a chat bot, with complete access to Godot.
translatedContent: We are integrating a chat bot, with complete access to Godot.

originContent: The chatbot can:
translatedContent: The chatbot can:

originContent: - Read/edit/create/delete files
translatedContent: - Read/edit/create/delete files

originContent: - understand the entire project as context
translatedContent: - understand the entire project as context

originContent: - create images and keep consistency across images created
translatedContent: - create images and keep consistency across images created

originContent: - edit godot native objects, e.g. nodes, scenes, ...
translatedContent: - edit godot native objects, e.g. nodes, scenes, ...

originContent: ### AI Assistant Capabilities
translatedContent: ### AI Assistant Capabilities

originContent: The integrated chatbot has access to comprehensive tools for Godot development:
translatedContent: The integrated chatbot has access to comprehensive tools for Godot development:

originContent: #### Scene & Node Management
translatedContent: #### Scene & Node Management

originContent: - **Scene Operations**: Open, create, save, and instantiate scenes
translatedContent: - **Scene Operations**: Open, create, save, and instantiate scenes

originContent: - **Node Manipulation**: Create, delete, move, and rename nodes in the scene tree
translatedContent: - **Node Manipulation**: Create, delete, move, and rename nodes in the scene tree

originContent: - **Node Inspection**: Get node properties, scripts, and hierarchical information
translatedContent: - **Node Inspection**: Get node properties, scripts, and hierarchical information

originContent: - **Node Selection**: Work with currently selected nodes in the editor
translatedContent: - **Node Selection**: Work with currently selected nodes in the editor

originContent: - **Class Discovery**: Access all available Godot node classes and their capabilities
translatedContent: - **Class Discovery**: Access all available Godot node classes and their capabilities

originContent: #### Script & Code Management
translatedContent: #### Script & Code Management

originContent: - **File Operations**: Read, write, and edit any project file with line-specific targeting
translatedContent: - **File Operations**: Read, write, and edit any project file with line-specific targeting

originContent: - **Script Generation**: Create new GDScript files with AI-powered code generation
translatedContent: - **Script Generation**: Create new GDScript files with AI-powered code generation

originContent: - **Code Editing**: Apply intelligent edits to existing scripts with natural language prompts
translatedContent: - **Code Editing**: Apply intelligent edits to existing scripts with natural language prompts

originContent: - **Error Detection**: Check for compilation errors across single files or entire project
translatedContent: - **Error Detection**: Check for compilation errors across single files or entire project

originContent: - **Script Attachment**: Attach and manage scripts on nodes
translatedContent: - **Script Attachment**: Attach and manage scripts on nodes

originContent: #### Project Navigation & Search
translatedContent: #### Project Navigation & Search

originContent: - **File System**: Browse project directories and files with filtering options
translatedContent: - **File System**: Browse project directories and files with filtering options

originContent: - **Advanced Semantic Search**: Find relevant files and code using natural language queries with **function-level intelligence**
translatedContent: - **Advanced Semantic Search**: Find relevant files and code using natural language queries with **function-level intelligence**

originContent: - **Multi-Hop Dependency Tracing**: Understand complete function call chains and signal flows across your project
translatedContent: - **Multi-Hop Dependency Tracing**: Understand complete function call chains and signal flows across your project

originContent: - **Graph Analysis**: Discover connected files, central project components, and architectural relationships
translatedContent: - **Graph Analysis**: Discover connected files, central project components, and architectural relationships

originContent: - **Smart Search Modes**: Semantic (AI understanding), keyword (exact text), or hybrid (combined) search
translatedContent: - **Smart Search Modes**: Semantic (AI understanding), keyword (exact text), or hybrid (combined) search

originContent: > 🔍 **[See Advanced Indexing Documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/indexing.md)** for technical details on function-level chunking, signal flow tracking, and dependency analysis
translatedContent: > 🔍 **[See Advanced Indexing Documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/indexing.md)** for technical details on function-level chunking, signal flow tracking, and dependency analysis

originContent: #### Visual Content Creation
translatedContent: #### Visual Content Creation

originContent: - **Image Generation**: Create new images from text descriptions with various art styles
translatedContent: - **Image Generation**: Create new images from text descriptions with various art styles

originContent: - **Image Editing**: Modify existing images using AI-powered editing
translatedContent: - **Image Editing**: Modify existing images using AI-powered editing

originContent: - **3D Model Generation**: Generate 3D models from text prompts or images (when configured)
translatedContent: - **3D Model Generation**: Generate 3D models from text prompts or images (when configured)

originContent: - **Asset Management**: Save generated images to specific project paths
translatedContent: - **Asset Management**: Save generated images to specific project paths

originContent: - **Style Consistency**: Maintain visual coherence across generated assets
translatedContent: - **Style Consistency**: Maintain visual coherence across generated assets

originContent: #### Physics & Game Objects
translatedContent: #### Physics & Game Objects

originContent: - **Collision Shapes**: Add collision detection to physics bodies (rectangle, circle, capsule)
translatedContent: - **Collision Shapes**: Add collision detection to physics bodies (rectangle, circle, capsule)

originContent: - **Node Properties**: Modify transform, physics, and gameplay properties
translatedContent: - **Node Properties**: Modify transform, physics, and gameplay properties

originContent: - **Method Calls**: Execute node methods with custom parameters
translatedContent: - **Method Calls**: Execute node methods with custom parameters

originContent: #### Signal & Connection System
translatedContent: #### Signal & Connection System

originContent: - **Signal Inspection**: List available signals and their connections
translatedContent: - **Signal Inspection**: List available signals and their connections

originContent: - **Connection Management**: Create and manage signal connections between nodes
translatedContent: - **Connection Management**: Create and manage signal connections between nodes

originContent: - **Signal Tracing**: Debug signal flow with lightweight event tracking
translatedContent: - **Signal Tracing**: Debug signal flow with lightweight event tracking

originContent: - **Connection Validation**: Verify signal connection integrity
translatedContent: - **Connection Validation**: Verify signal connection integrity

originContent: #### Development Workflow
translatedContent: #### Development Workflow

originContent: - **Multi-Model Support**: Choose between GPT-5, Claude-4, Gemini-2.5, and GPT-4o
translatedContent: - **Multi-Model Support**: Choose between GPT-5, Claude-4, Gemini-2.5, and GPT-4o

originContent: - **Real-time Assistance**: Stream responses with tool execution feedback
translatedContent: - **Real-time Assistance**: Stream responses with tool execution feedback

originContent: - **Error Recovery**: Intelligent fallback between AI providers for reliability
translatedContent: - **Error Recovery**: Intelligent fallback between AI providers for reliability

originContent: - **Authentication**: Secure access with OAuth (Google, GitHub, Microsoft) or guest mode
translatedContent: - **Authentication**: Secure access with OAuth (Google, GitHub, Microsoft) or guest mode

originContent: ### Advanced Indexing System
translatedContent: ### Advanced Indexing System

originContent: Orca Engine features a **best-in-class Godot indexing system** that understands your code at the **function level**:
translatedContent: Orca Engine features a **best-in-class Godot indexing system** that understands your code at the **function level**:

originContent: - **🎯 Function-Level Intelligence**: Each GDScript function, signal, and export becomes a searchable unit with rich metadata
translatedContent: - **🎯 Function-Level Intelligence**: Each GDScript function, signal, and export becomes a searchable unit with rich metadata

originContent: - **🔗 Signal Flow Tracking**: Complete understanding of signal emission → connection → handler chains across your entire project
translatedContent: - **🔗 Signal Flow Tracking**: Complete understanding of signal emission → connection → handler chains across your entire project

originContent: - **🕸️ Multi-Hop Dependency Tracing**: Trace function call chains (e.g., Input → Controller → Physics → Animation)
translatedContent: - **🕸️ Multi-Hop Dependency Tracing**: Trace function call chains (e.g., Input → Controller → Physics → Animation)

originContent: - **📊 Graph Centrality Analysis**: Identify architecturally important files and their structural roles
translatedContent: - **📊 Graph Centrality Analysis**: Identify architecturally important files and their structural roles

originContent: - **🔍 Smart Search Modes**: Semantic (AI understanding), keyword (exact text), or hybrid (combined) search
translatedContent: - **🔍 Smart Search Modes**: Semantic (AI understanding), keyword (exact text), or hybrid (combined) search

originContent: **Performance**: ~2.7x more intelligent chunks than traditional line-based indexing, enabling precise understanding of complex game mechanics.
translatedContent: **Performance**: ~2.7x more intelligent chunks than traditional line-based indexing, enabling precise understanding of complex game mechanics.

originContent: > 📚 **[Technical Deep Dive: Advanced Indexing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/indexing.md)** | **[Backend Setup Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md)**
translatedContent: > 📚 **[Technical Deep Dive: Advanced Indexing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/indexing.md)** | **[Backend Setup Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md)**

originContent: ### Quick Start (Editor Only)
translatedContent: ### Quick Start (Editor Only)

originContent: Build and run the editor. The AI features connect to our cloud backend by default. No local backend setup is required.
translatedContent: Build and run the editor. The AI features connect to our cloud backend by default. No local backend setup is required.

originContent: macOS:
translatedContent: macOS:

originContent: ```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: git clone https://github.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine.git
translatedContent: git clone https://github.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine.git

originContent: cd orca-engine
translatedContent: cd orca-engine

originContent: brew install scons pkg-config python3 git
translatedContent: brew install scons pkg-config python3 git

originContent: scons platform=macos target=editor dev_build=yes vulkan=no -j"$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)"
translatedContent: scons platform=macos target=editor dev_build=yes vulkan=no -j"$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)"

originContent: ./bin/godot.macos.editor.dev.arm64
translatedContent: ./bin/godot.macos.editor.dev.arm64
Windows (PowerShell):

originContent: Windows (PowerShell):
```powershell
translatedContent: ```powershell

originContent: git clone https://github.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine.git
translatedContent: git clone https://github.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine.git

originContent: cd orca-engine
translatedContent: cd orca-engine

originContent: # If needed: scoop install python scons git   (or: choco install python scons git)
translatedContent: # If needed: scoop install python scons git   (or: choco install python scons git)

originContent: scons platform=windows target=editor dev_build=yes vulkan=no -j $env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS
translatedContent: scons platform=windows target=editor dev_build=yes vulkan=no -j $env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS

originContent: .\bin\godot.windows.editor.dev.x86_64.exe
translatedContent: .\bin\godot.windows.editor.dev.x86_64.exe
Linux (Ubuntu/Debian):

originContent: Linux (Ubuntu/Debian):
```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: git clone https://github.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine.git
translatedContent: git clone https://github.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine.git

originContent: cd orca-engine
translatedContent: cd orca-engine

originContent: sudo apt update
translatedContent: sudo apt update

originContent: sudo apt install -y build-essential scons pkg-config libx11-dev libxcursor-dev libxinerama-dev \
translatedContent: sudo apt install -y build-essential scons pkg-config libx11-dev libxcursor-dev libxinerama-dev \

originContent: libgl1-mesa-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libasound2-dev libpulse-dev libudev-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev \
translatedContent: libgl1-mesa-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libasound2-dev libpulse-dev libudev-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev \

originContent: python3 python3-pip git
translatedContent: python3 python3-pip git

originContent: scons platform=linuxbsd target=editor dev_build=yes vulkan=no -j"$(nproc)"
translatedContent: scons platform=linuxbsd target=editor dev_build=yes vulkan=no -j"$(nproc)"

originContent: ./bin/godot.linuxbsd.editor.dev.x86_64
translatedContent: ./bin/godot.linuxbsd.editor.dev.x86_64

originContent: Notes:
translatedContent: Notes:

originContent: - No Vulkan SDK required. The editor uses the platform default renderer (Metal on macOS, D3D12 on Windows, GLES3 on Linux). Vulkan is optional and not needed to build or run the editor.
translatedContent: - No Vulkan SDK required. The editor uses the platform default renderer (Metal on macOS, D3D12 on Windows, GLES3 on Linux). Vulkan is optional and not needed to build or run the editor.

originContent: - To point the editor to a self-hosted backend instead of cloud, see the backend section below.
translatedContent: - To point the editor to a self-hosted backend instead of cloud, see the backend section below.

originContent: ### Backend (Optional Local / Cloud Deploy)
translatedContent: ### Backend (Optional Local / Cloud Deploy)

originContent: - For local development or self-hosting, follow the **[Backend Setup Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md)**. It covers environment variables, running locally, and deploying to Google Cloud Run via `backend/deploy.sh`.
translatedContent: - For local development or self-hosting, follow the **[Backend Setup Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md)**. It covers environment variables, running locally, and deploying to Google Cloud Run via `backend/deploy.sh`.

originContent: - For advanced indexing details (function-level chunks, dependency graphs), see **[backend/indexing.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/indexing.md)**.
translatedContent: - For advanced indexing details (function-level chunks, dependency graphs), see **[backend/indexing.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/indexing.md)**.

originContent: #### Environment Configuration
translatedContent: #### Environment Configuration

originContent: Create a `.env` file in the `backend/` directory with your API keys:
translatedContent: Create a `.env` file in the `backend/` directory with your API keys:

originContent: ```env
translatedContent: ```env

originContent: # Required: AI provider for embeddings and chat
translatedContent: # Required: AI provider for embeddings and chat

originContent: OPENAI_API_KEY=YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY
translatedContent: OPENAI_API_KEY=YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY

originContent: # ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
translatedContent: # ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

originContent: # GOOGLE_API_KEY=YOUR_GOOGLE_API_KEY
translatedContent: # GOOGLE_API_KEY=YOUR_GOOGLE_API_KEY

originContent: # Required: For advanced vector search and function-level indexing
translatedContent: # Required: For advanced vector search and function-level indexing

originContent: WEAVIATE_URL=https://YOUR-WEAVIATE-ENDPOINT
translatedContent: WEAVIATE_URL=https://YOUR-WEAVIATE-ENDPOINT

originContent: WEAVIATE_API_KEY=YOUR_WEAVIATE_API_KEY
translatedContent: WEAVIATE_API_KEY=YOUR_WEAVIATE_API_KEY

originContent: # Optional: Additional configuration
translatedContent: # Optional: Additional configuration

originContent: FLASK_SECRET_KEY=YOUR_RANDOM_SECRET_KEY
translatedContent: FLASK_SECRET_KEY=YOUR_RANDOM_SECRET_KEY

originContent: # Development mode (set to 'false' in production)
translatedContent: # Development mode (set to 'false' in production)

originContent: DEV_MODE=true
translatedContent: DEV_MODE=true

originContent: > ⚙️ **[See Backend Configuration Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md)** for complete environment variable documentation and deployment instructions
translatedContent: > ⚙️ **[See Backend Configuration Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md)** for complete environment variable documentation and deployment instructions

originContent: #### Indexing performance (large projects)
translatedContent: #### Indexing performance (large projects)

originContent: The editor triggers server-side indexing automatically. For large codebases, set these to speed things up (in `backend/.env` locally or before running `backend/deploy.sh` so Cloud Run picks them up as secrets):
translatedContent: The editor triggers server-side indexing automatically. For large codebases, set these to speed things up (in `backend/.env` locally or before running `backend/deploy.sh` so Cloud Run picks them up as secrets):

originContent: ```env
translatedContent: ```env

originContent: # Parallelism and batching
translatedContent: # Parallelism and batching

originContent: INDEX_MAX_WORKERS=32         # number of parallel file workers on the backend
translatedContent: INDEX_MAX_WORKERS=32         # number of parallel file workers on the backend

originContent: EMBED_MAX_PARALLEL=12        # concurrent embedding batches (respect provider limits)
translatedContent: EMBED_MAX_PARALLEL=12        # concurrent embedding batches (respect provider limits)

originContent: EMBED_BATCH_SIZE=256         # embeddings per batch
translatedContent: EMBED_BATCH_SIZE=256         # embeddings per batch

originContent: CHUNK_MAX_LINES=100          # larger chunks = fewer embedding calls
translatedContent: CHUNK_MAX_LINES=100          # larger chunks = fewer embedding calls

originContent: # Small response caches
translatedContent: # Small response caches

originContent: SEARCH_CACHE_TTL=45
translatedContent: SEARCH_CACHE_TTL=45

originContent: GRAPH_CACHE_TTL=45
translatedContent: GRAPH_CACHE_TTL=45

originContent: Notes:
translatedContent: Notes:

originContent: - You can also pass `INDEX_MAX_WORKERS` from the editor via env; it is forwarded to the backend for `index_project`/`index_files`.
translatedContent: - You can also pass `INDEX_MAX_WORKERS` from the editor via env; it is forwarded to the backend for `index_project`/`index_files`.

originContent: - When deploying to Cloud Run, ensure sufficient resources (e.g., `--cpu 4`, `--memory 8Gi`, higher `--concurrency`).
translatedContent: - When deploying to Cloud Run, ensure sufficient resources (e.g., `--cpu 4`, `--memory 8Gi`, higher `--concurrency`).

originContent: ### Godot Docs Search (RAG)
translatedContent: ### Godot Docs Search (RAG)

originContent: See **[Godot Docs Search: Indexing and Querying](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/./godot_doc_search.md)**.
translatedContent: See **[Godot Docs Search: Indexing and Querying](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/./godot_doc_search.md)**.

originContent: #### Troubleshooting
translatedContent: #### Troubleshooting

originContent: **Editor & Build Issues:**
translatedContent: **Editor & Build Issues:**

originContent: - **Build errors**: See [upstream Godot build documentation](https://docs.godotengine.org/en/stable/development/compiling/index.html) for platform-specific issues
translatedContent: - **Build errors**: See [upstream Godot build documentation](https://docs.godotengine.org/en/stable/development/compiling/index.html) for platform-specific issues

originContent: - **Python dependency issues**: Ensure you're using Python 3.8+ and consider using a virtual environment
translatedContent: - **Python dependency issues**: Ensure you're using Python 3.8+ and consider using a virtual environment

originContent: - **Missing tools**: The chatbot tools will only appear once the backend connection is established
translatedContent: - **Missing tools**: The chatbot tools will only appear once the backend connection is established

originContent: **AI Backend Issues:**
translatedContent: **AI Backend Issues:**

originContent: - **Connection problems**: Verify the backend is running on http://localhost:8000 and API keys are properly configured
translatedContent: - **Connection problems**: Verify the backend is running on http://localhost:8000 and API keys are properly configured

originContent: - **Search not working**: Check Weaviate connection (WEAVIATE_URL and WEAVIATE_API_KEY in .env)
translatedContent: - **Search not working**: Check Weaviate connection (WEAVIATE_URL and WEAVIATE_API_KEY in .env)

originContent: - **Indexing issues**: See function extraction and dependency tracking logs
translatedContent: - **Indexing issues**: See function extraction and dependency tracking logs

originContent: > 🔧 **[Detailed Backend Troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md#troubleshooting)** for vector search, indexing, and API configuration issues
translatedContent: > 🔧 **[Detailed Backend Troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Simplifine-gamedev/orca-engine/main/backend/README.md#troubleshooting)** for vector search, indexing, and API configuration issues
